violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoops in dry product on back shelf need to have the handles up.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not properly date marked. -Open containers in the walk in cooler not date marked.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Plates in the kitchen are not inverted.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Back handwash sink needs paper towels.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust buildup on the top and side of the vent hood. Walls in the food prep area need cleaned.
